issue_title: JsonWriter#value(java.lang.Number) can be lenient, but JsonWriter#value(double) can't,

buggy_code_comment:
/**
* Encodes {@code value}.
*
* @param value a finite value. May not be {@link Double#isNaN() NaNs} or
*     {@link Double#isInfinite() infinities}.
* @return this writer.
*/
